name: team-progress-bar-01
title: Team Progress Bar
author: ilinxa
description: An always-visible, read-only progress bar showing one team's milestone-completion % — signal-lime fill on the shadcn progress primitive, optional per-milestone tick notches (filled = done, in order), a percent/fraction readout, a reduced-motion-aware fill transition, and a progress-bar.checked telemetry event emitted once per mount on first in-viewport reveal. Takes either a Milestone[] (computes done/total) or a direct value (0–100). Cooperative and team-scoped by design: one team's own % only — never another team's bar, a leaderboard, a ranking, or a per-member split. Ships shadcn-style: a batteries-included <TeamProgressBar01> plus a headless <TeamProgressBarRoot> + flat à-la-carte parts (TeamProgressBarTrack, TeamProgressBarLabel) + a context-free ProgressTrack primitive, so a bar-only header falls out by dropping the Label. Portable — zero next/*, no app context, no other registry import; SSR-safe; all data is the host's. First component of the gamification-system.
